narrative: UK CPI inflation climbs to 3.3% YoY, in line with expectations — Pound Sterling faces slight selling pressure; EUR/GBP holds at 0.8690. The Fed-ECB 175bp rate differential sustains EUR/USD at 1.1758; US yields rise, 10Y at 4.292%. Watch BoE and ECB meetings Thursday — any dovish signals could pressure GBP and EUR.
